segments.text: Come, all you who are thirsty, come to the waters; and you without money, come, buy, and eat! Come, buy wine and milkwithout money and without cost!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Why spend money on that which is not bread, and your labor on that which does not satisfy? Listen carefully to Me, and eat what is good, and your soul will delight in the richest of foods.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Incline your ear and come to Me; listen, so that your soul may live. I will make with you an everlasting covenant—My loving devotion promised to David.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Behold, I have made him a witness to the nations, a leader and commander of the peoples.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Surely you will summon a nation you do not know, and nations who do not know you will run to you. For the LORD your God, the Holy One of Israel, has bestowed glory on you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Seek the LORD while He may be found; call on Him while He is near.
Let the wicked man forsake his own way and the unrighteous man his own thoughts; let him return to the LORD, that He may have compassion, and to our God, for He will freely pardon.
For My thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways My ways,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
For as the heavens are higher than the earth, so My ways are higher than your ways
and My thoughts than your thoughts.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For just as rain and snow fall from heaven and do not return without watering the earth, making it bud and sprout, and providing seed to sow and food to eat,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: so My word that proceeds from My mouthwill not return to Me empty, but it will accomplish what I please, and it will prosper where I send it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You will indeed go out with joy and be led forth in peace; the mountains and hills will burst into song before you, and all the trees of the field will clap their hands.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Instead of the thornbush, a cypress will grow, and instead of the brier, a myrtle will spring up; they will make a name for the LORD, an everlasting sign, never to be destroyed.
segments.speaker: The LORD
